Translated qualitative signals from 20+ partner teams into **prioritized product hypotheses**, sequencing the growth roadmap to maximize recovery-rate gains and reduce time-to-insight across the validation lifecycle.

tailoring_notes: Mirrored JD vocabulary throughout: 'measurement foundation,' 'product hypotheses,' 'activation,' 'feedback loop,' 'zero-to-one,' and 'friction' appear across bullets to signal direct alignment with Granted's growth PM language.
